title: Flashlight Template for Simply Upscaled
description: This let's you use custom textures for the flashlight feature in 'Simply Upscaled' shaders. It is just an  example resource pack that you are free to edit and make your own versions of and distribute.
body: This let's you use custom textures for the flashlight feature in 'Simply Upscaled' shaders. It is just an  example resource pack that you are free to edit and make your own versions of and distribute.
